name: unrecognisable-payload-skip
description: #47 D3 case (d): a stop payload that carries NEITHER agent_type (Claude) NOR agent_name (Copilot compat) is an unrecognised family shape. A conforming adapter writes NO record and emits a VISIBLE skip on stderr naming the keys that WERE present (never a guessed record). Provenance: DESIGN-MANDATED - the landed producer exits 0 SILENTLY on this input (scripts/Produce-Artifact.ps1 returned filter: empty agent_type -> exit 0 with no stderr); this vector lands red-first for the visible-skip requirement (the three-hour 'fully silent producer' misdiagnosis, superseded design D2).
